read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata with PdfFileInfo
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF, read its metadata using PdfFileInfo, modify fields such as title and author, and save the updated information to a new file.

read-pdf-author-metadata.title: Read PDF Author Metadata
read-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to open a PDF, retrieve the Author metadata property, and print it to the console.

read-pdf-title-metadata-log.title: Read PDF Title Metadata and Write to Log
read-pdf-title-metadata-log.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read the Title metadata from a PDF file and write the value to a simple log file.

retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Retrieve PDF Keywords Metadata
retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and read the Keywords metadata property, then display it on the console.

read-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Read PDF Creator Metadata with PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, retrieve the Creator metadata property, and store it in a variable.

read-pdf-modification-date.title: Read and Format PDF Modification Date
read-pdf-modification-date.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileInfo to retrieve a PDF's ModDate, parse the PDF date string, and display it in a human‑readable format.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to set the Author property of a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new PDF.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata with PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to modify the Title property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the changes to a new file with SaveNewInfo.

set-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Set PDF Keywords Metadata with PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to set the Keywords metadata field of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, save the changes to a new file, and verify the value.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata with PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom Creator value to a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade and persist the change to a new file with SaveNewInfo.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF using PdfFileInfo
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata entry to a PDF file with the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata (ProjectCode)
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" from a PDF file and display its value.

add-custom-metadata-reviewedby-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata 'ReviewedBy' to PDF
add-custom-metadata-reviewedby-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfFileInfo, setting a custom metadata field using SetMetaInfo, and safely saving the updated document to a new file.

retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata 'ReviewedBy'
retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read a custom metadata property named 'ReviewedBy' from a PDF and log the value for audit purposes.

add-department-metadata-to-pdfs.title: Add Custom 'Department' Metadata to PDFs
add-department-metadata-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files, set a custom metadata field named "Department" using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, and save the updated PDFs to a separate folder.

preserve-pdf-metadata-add-version.title: Preserve PDF Metadata and Add Version Field
preserve-pdf-metadata-add-version.description: Demonstrates how to keep all existing PDF metadata while adding or updating a custom "Version" field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

remove-custom-pdf-metadata-entry.title: Remove Custom PDF Metadata Entry Using PdfFileInfo
remove-custom-pdf-metadata-entry.description: Demonstrates how to clear a specific custom metadata field in a PDF by setting its value to empty with PdfFileInfo.SetMetaInfo and saving the updated document.

check-custom-metadata-key.title: Check for Custom Metadata Key in PDF
check-custom-metadata-key.description: Demonstrates how to verify the existence of a custom metadata entry (e.g., "Confidential") in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades before reading its value.

add-custom-timestamp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Timestamp Metadata to PDF
add-custom-timestamp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata field containing the current UTC timestamp to a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document.

update-pdf-metadata-save-new-info.title: Update PDF Metadata and Save New Info
update-pdf-metadata-save-new-info.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfFileInfo, modify its metadata properties, and write the changes to a new file using SaveNewInfo.

read-pdf-metadata-add-blank-page.title: Read PDF Metadata and Add a Blank Page with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-metadata-add-blank-page.description: Demonstrates how to read basic PDF metadata using PdfFileInfo, obtain the page count, add a new blank page, and save the modified document while properly disposing resources.

backup-pdfs-update-metadata.title: Backup PDFs and Update Metadata with PdfFileInfo
backup-pdfs-update-metadata.description: Creates a backup copy of each PDF in a source folder, then modifies its metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and saves the changes.

update-pdf-metadata-audit.title: Update PDF Metadata and Log Changes to CSV
update-pdf-metadata-audit.description: Shows how to read existing PDF metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, modify the values, save the updated PDF, and write an audit CSV containing original and new metadata.

handle-readonly-file-errors-saving-pdf-m.title: Handle Read‑Only File Errors When Saving PDF Metadata
handle-readonly-file-errors-saving-pdf-m.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and gracefully handle IOException caused by a read‑only output file, including clearing the attribute and retrying the save.

update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.title: Update PDF Metadata Using MemoryStream and PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-metadata-using-memorystream.description: The example loads a PDF into a memory stream, updates its metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) via the PdfFileInfo facade, and saves the modified document to a new file.

update-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Update PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF from a stream with PdfFileInfo, change the Keywords metadata, and save the modified document to a new file.

conditionally-update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Conditionally Update PDF Author Metadata
conditionally-update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to read a PDF's Author metadata with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, update it only when the field is empty, and save the changes to a new file.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetica.title: Retrieve and Display Custom PDF Metadata Alphabetically
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetica.description: The example shows how to obtain all custom XMP metadata keys from a PDF, sort them alphabetically, and print each key with its corresponding value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-fileinfo.title: Merge XMP Metadata with PDF FileInfo
merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-fileinfo.description: Shows how to combine standard PDF file information with XMP metadata, add a custom XMP property, and save the merged metadata to a new PDF file.

read-pdf-version-using-aspose-pdf-facade.title: Read PDF Version Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
read-pdf-version-using-aspose-pdf-facade.description: Demonstrates how to initialize the PdfFileInfo facade, retrieve the PDF version string with GetPdfVersion, and store it for later use.

export-pdf-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-metadata-to-json.description: Reads metadata from each PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and writes the collected information to a JSON file for external processing.

import-pdf-metadata-from-json.title: Import PDF Metadata from JSON
import-pdf-metadata-from-json.description: Shows how to read metadata values from a JSON file and apply them to a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade, including standard and custom properties.

update-pdf-metadata-in-parallel.title: Update PDF Metadata in Parallel Using Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-metadata-in-parallel.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF metadata such as title, author, subject, and keywords for multiple PDF files concurrently using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileInfo class and TPL's Parallel.ForEach.

thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Metadata Update with PdfFileInfo
thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.description: Demonstrates processing multiple PDFs in parallel by creating a separate PdfFileInfo instance per thread, updating metadata properties safely, and saving the updated files.

validate-pdf-metadata-with-regex.title: Validate and Set PDF Metadata with Regex using PdfFileInfo
validate-pdf-metadata-with-regex.description: The example shows how to validate PDF metadata fields with regular expressions before assigning them via the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo facade and then saving the updated information to a new PDF file.

read-pdf-metadata-safely.title: Read PDF Metadata Safely with PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-metadata-safely.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, retrieving standard and custom metadata via GetMetaInfo, and gracefully handling null or empty values.

update-pdf-subject-metadata.title: Update PDF Subject Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-subject-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF, change its Subject metadata field with PdfFileInfo, and save the updated information to a new file using SaveNewInfo.

set-pdf-language-property.title: Set PDF Language Property Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-language-property.description: Demonstrates how to set the natural language of a PDF document to "en-US" using the PdfFileInfo facade and the tagged content API, then save the updated file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-with-pdffileinfo.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b and Save with PdfFileInfo
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-with-pdffileinfo.description: Creates a PDF in memory, converts it to PDF/A‑1b using Document.Convert, then uses the PdfFileInfo facade to enforce strict validation and save the PDF/A‑compliant file.

set-pdf-document-id-using-pdffileinfo.title: Set PDF Document ID Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-document-id-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to generate a GUID and store it as a custom metadata entry (DocumentId) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade, then save the updated file.
